iran_nuke.notes: Day 20 auto - DETERRENT 42% (stable). Day 23 auto - CRITICAL (stable). Natanz struck confirmed by Iran + IAEA (no radiation). Trump 48hr ultimatum ~25hrs to deadline (~23:44 GMT Mon Mar 24). Iran dismissed ultimatum. Iran death toll 1,500+, 20,984 injured. Iran intercepting US-Israeli drones over Tehran. IRGC claims 3rd Israeli fighter downed. Updated 2026-03-22T12:04:00Z

iran_conventional.notes: Day 20 auto - DETERRENT 100% (up). Day 23 auto - IMMINENT (up). Trump 48hr ultimatum ~25hrs to deadline (~23:44 GMT Mon Mar 24). Iran dismissed ultimatum. UAE intercepted 4 ballistic missiles + 25 UAVs TODAY (cumulative: 345 missiles, 1,773 UAVs). Saudi intercepted ~60 drones + 3 missiles toward Riyadh. Saudi expelled Iranian diplomats (24hr). Iran death toll 1,500+, 20,984 injured. Israeli strikes hit eastern Tehran (geographic expansion). Iran intercepted US-Israeli armed drone over Tehran. IRGC claims downed Israeli fighter (3rd). IDF soldiers wounded by mortar from Lebanon. Qatar helicopter crash (7 killed, technical). Updated 2026-03-22T12:04:00Z

latest_news.headline: UAE intercepts 4 ballistic missiles and 25 UAVs launched from Iran TODAY
latest_news.source: Gulf News / UAE Ministry of Defence
latest_news.text: UAE air defence intercepted 4 ballistic missiles + 25 drones from Iran today. Cumulative since war start: 345 ballistic missiles, 15 cruise missiles, 1,773 UAVs intercepted. 2 UAE military + 6 foreign nationals killed, 160 injured.

latest_news.headline: Saudi Arabia intercepts ~60 Iranian drones, 3 ballistic missiles toward Riyadh
latest_news.text: Saudi Arabia intercepted nearly 60 Iranian drones targeting Eastern Province energy facilities. 3 ballistic missiles launched toward Riyadh - 1 intercepted, 2 fell in uninhabited areas. Saudi also expelled Iranian military attache + staff.

latest_news.headline: Iran death toll passes 1,500, 20,984 injured from US-Israeli strikes
latest_news.source: Al Jazeera / Iran Ministry of Health
latest_news.text: Iran state broadcaster confirms 1,500+ killed, 20,984 injured from US-Israeli attacks. 7 hospitals evacuated, 36 ambulances damaged.

latest_news.headline: Israeli strikes hit eastern Tehran - geographic expansion of attacks
latest_news.text: Israel launched new attacks on Tehran on Sunday, explosions reported in the east of the city - further geographic expansion of strikes beyond oil depot/refinery strikes.

iran_conventional.syria_escalation_note: Monitoring. Israel strikes in Sweida province Syria continue. Potential for separate tracker if escalation widens.

israel_lebanon.notes: Day 20 auto - DETERRENT 72% (stable). Day 23 auto - IMMINENT (stable). 2 IDF soldiers wounded by mortar from Lebanon (Haaretz). Israel striking across Beirut + Tehran simultaneously. Ground fighting S. Lebanon continues. 1,000+ killed, 1M+ displaced. Demolishing frontline homes. Updated 2026-03-22T12:04:00Z

latest_news.headline: Israel strikes Hezbollah targets in Beirut - 7 neighborhoods evacuated
latest_news.text: Israeli military strikes Hezbollah targets in Beirut early Saturday. Evacuation warnings for 7 neighborhoods in southern suburbs. Jets bombed Beirut at 3am. Ghandouriyeh house strike kills 1, wounds 2.

latest_news.headline: WaPo: Israel strikes Hezbollah health center, kills 12 medical workers
latest_news.text: Israeli strike hit Hezbollah-run health center in southern Lebanon, killed 12 medical workers. Israel widens campaign beyond fighters to civilian infrastructure.

turkey.notes: Day 20 auto - DETERRENT 2% (stable). Day 23 auto - DETERRENT (stable). Qatar helicopter crash killed 3 Turkish nationals (technical, not combat). No new Turkey-specific escalation. NATO Patriot at Incirlik stable. Updated 2026-03-22T12:04:00Z

latest_news.headline: NATO deploys 3rd Patriot battery to Incirlik Air Base
latest_news.text: Turkey announces 3rd NATO Patriot at Incirlik (2 systems now at base + 1 at Kürecik radar). Authorized by NATO AIRCOM Ramstein. Turkey's 2nd-largest NATO army now key air defense hub.

latest_news.headline: 3 Iranian ballistic missiles intercepted over Turkey since war began
latest_news.text: Confirmed: 3 Iranian missiles intercepted over Turkish airspace (Mar 4, Mar 9 near Gaziantep, Mar 13 near Incirlik). NATO air defenses in Eastern Mediterranean operating at sustained tempo.

india.notes: Day 20 auto - DETERRENT 3% (stable). Day 23 auto - DETERRENT (stable). No new developments. Pezeshkian calls on BRICS (chaired by India) to intervene, but no military escalation. Updated 2026-03-22T12:04:00Z

russia.notes: Day 20 auto - DETERRENT 14% (up). Day 23 auto - DETERRENT (up). Russia benefits from oil price shock + sanctions waiver. Zelensky: Putin wants long Iran war. No new NATO-Russia incidents. Updated 2026-03-22T12:04:00Z

china.notes: Day 20 auto - DETERRENT 5% (stable). Day 23 auto - DETERRENT (stable). No new developments. US-China trade talks continue. Taiwan stable. Updated 2026-03-22T12:04:00Z

north_korea.notes: Day 20 auto - DETERRENT 2% (stable). Day 23 auto - DETERRENT (stable). No new developments. SPA session complete. No military activity. Updated 2026-03-22T12:04:00Z

russia_ukraine.notes: Day 20 auto - DETERRENT 30% (up). Day 23 auto - CRITICAL (up). Zelensky sent negotiators to US for weekend talks (NYT). Russia absent from Florida talks. ISW: Russian mechanized assaults intensifying. Peace talks paused due to Iran war. Oil price shock boosts Russian revenue. Updated 2026-03-22T12:04:00Z

latest_news.headline: US-backed Ukraine-Russia talks continue, more sessions Sunday
latest_news.text: Ukraine and Russia trade strikes as US-brokered talks in Florida continue. Deaths reported on both sides. More negotiating sessions scheduled for Sunday.

latest_news.headline: Russia intensifying mechanized assaults — spring-summer offensive prep
latest_news.text: ISW assessment: Russian forces increasingly conducting mechanized assaults on frontline, possibly part of intensified preparation for Spring-Summer 2026 offensive.

pakistan_afghanistan.notes: Day 20 auto - DETERRENT 26% (stable). Day 23 auto - ELEVATED (stable). Eid ceasefire holding through Mar 24 at Saudi/Qatar/Turkey request. TTP also truce. Post-Eid resumption feared Mar 25. No new fighting. Updated 2026-03-22T12:04:00Z

latest_news.headline: Pakistan-Afghanistan Eid ceasefire holding, TTP also declares 3-day truce
latest_news.text: 5-day Eid ceasefire (Mar 18-23) holding. TTP separately declares 3-day ceasefire. Qatar welcomes truce. No fighting reported. Post-Eid resumption expected.

top_signals: TRUMP 48HR ULTIMATUM ACTIVE: Deadline ~23:44 GMT Mon Mar 24 (~25hrs) - 'obliterate power plants'
Iran DISMISSED ultimatum - threatened 'IRREVERSIBLE DAMAGE' to ALL regional infrastructure
UAE intercepted 4 ballistic missiles + 25 UAVs TODAY (cumulative: 345 missiles, 1,773 UAVs)
Saudi intercepted ~60 drones + 3 missiles toward Riyadh today
Saudi Arabia expelled Iranian diplomatic staff (24hr deadline) - Qatar did same earlier
Iran death toll 1,500+, 20,984 injured (Iran MoH confirmed)
Israeli strikes expand to eastern Tehran
Iran intercepted US-Israeli armed drone over Tehran; IRGC claims downed Israeli fighter (3rd)
Natanz nuclear facility struck confirmed by Iran + IAEA (no radiation leak)
IDF soldiers wounded by mortar from Lebanon - active Hezbollah fire
Russia-Ukraine peace talks: Zelensky sent negotiators to US, Russia absent
Pakistan-Afghanistan Eid ceasefire holding through Mar 24

new: Dimona/Arad injuries UP to ~200 (from 180+) — Guardian confirms
Iran parliament speaker: 'IRREVERSIBLE DAMAGE to regional infrastructure' if power plants attacked
Israel demolishing Lebanese frontline village homes — accelerated campaign (Hindu)
Russia BENEFITS: US issues 30-day waiver for sanctioned Russian oil purchases
Zelensky: 'Putin wants long war in Iran — depletion of US reserves and air defense'
400+ Iranian ballistic missiles at Israel, 92% intercepted (British assessment)
removed: trump_winding_down_war REMOVED — contradicted by 48hr ultimatum to 'obliterate' power plants
enrichment_destroyed REMOVED — no confirmation found in current reporting
changed_signals.de_escalation_watch: Day 22 Hour 12 UTC. DE-ESCALATION: Pakistan ceasefire to Mar 24. IAEA: no radiation at Dimona. US-China trade talks ongoing. ESCALATION: Trump ultimatum ~37hrs to deadline. Iran: 'irreversible damage' to ALL regional infrastructure. Russia benefits from sanctions waiver. Israel demolishing Lebanese homes. 400+ missiles at Israel. NET: IMMINENT ESCALATION toward ultimatum deadline with RECIPROCAL THREATS intensifying.

latest_news.headline: Iran parliament speaker: 'irreversible damage' to regional infrastructure if power plants attacked
latest_news.text: Qalibaf on X: 'Immediately after power plants targeted, critical infrastructure, energy infrastructure, and oil facilities throughout region will be legitimate targets and destroyed in irreversible manner, oil prices will remain high for long time.'

latest_news.headline: ~200 injured in Iranian missile strikes near Dimona nuclear facility
latest_news.text: About 200 people wounded in Iranian strikes on Dimona and Arad in southern Israel. Air defense systems failed to intercept projectiles near nuclear facility. 10-year-old boy seriously hurt.

latest_news.headline: Russia benefits from Iran war — US eases Russian oil sanctions
latest_news.text: Trump admin issues 30-day waiver for countries to buy sanctioned Russian oil to ease prices. Zelensky to BBC: 'Putin wants long war in Iran — depletion of US reserves, air defense manufacturers.' Many European countries condemn the sanctions easing.

latest_news.headline: Israel instructs military to speed up demolition of Lebanese homes in 'frontline villages'
latest_news.text: Israel instructs military to accelerate demolition of Lebanese homes in border 'frontline villages' — expanding infrastructure destruction campaign in southern Lebanon.

latest_news.headline: 400+ Iranian ballistic missiles at Israel since war start, 92% intercepted
latest_news.text: Britain says no evidence Iran has nukes. 400+ ballistic missiles fired at Israel, ~92% intercepted. Remaining 8% caused ~200 injuries at Dimona/Arad and other sites.

outlook: IMMINENT (Day 22, 12:00 UTC). Trump 48hr ultimatum ~37hrs to deadline. Iran DISMISSED ultimatum and threatened 'IRREVERSIBLE DAMAGE' to ALL regional infrastructure (Qalibaf). ~200 injured Dimona/Arad. Iran launched NEW attacks on Israel. Russia BENEFITS from US sanctions waiver — Zelensky warns Putin wants long Iran war. Israel demolishing Lebanese frontline homes. 400+ missiles at Israel (92% intercepted). No diplomatic off-ramps visible. Power plant strikes + regional energy retaliation highly likely within 37hrs.
de_escalation_watch: Day 23 Hour 12 UTC. DE-ESCALATION: Pakistan ceasefire to Mar 24. IAEA no radiation at Natanz. Zelensky sent negotiators to US for weekend talks. ESCALATION: Trump ultimatum ~25hrs to deadline. Iran dismissed ultimatum. UAE intercepted 4 missiles + 25 drones TODAY. Saudi intercepted 60 drones. Saudi + Qatar expelled Iranian diplomats. Iran death toll 1,500+. Israeli strikes expanding in Tehran. Iran intercepting US drones. NET: IMMINENT ESCALATION toward ultimatum deadline. Multiple active fronts escalating simultaneously.
